name: Strawberry Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Combine sliced strawberries and 1/4 to 1/2 cup sugar; stir gently, and chill 1 to 2 hours. Drain.
2. Soften butter and divide between two 9-inch round cake pans. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, 1/4 cup sugar, and nutmeg. Cut in remaining butter with a pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal.
4. Combine milk and egg yolks; beat well. Add to flour mixture; stir with a fork until a soft dough forms. Pat dough evenly into cake pans (dough will be sticky; moisten fingers with water as necessary).
5. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Brush surface of dough with beaten egg whites; sprinkle evenly with 1/4 cup sugar.
6. Bake at 450°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until layers are golden brown. Remove from pans and let cool completely on wire racks.
7. Beat whipping cream until foamy; gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
8. Place one cake layer on a serving plate. Spread half of whipped cream over the layer, and arrange half of sliced strawberries on top. Repeat with remaining layer, whipped cream, and strawberries. Use whole strawberries for garnish.
